name: Reinstate, release a reserved voucher
description: POST .../redeem with body { action: 'Reinstate', reservationKey }. Moves the voucher Reserved → Issued, the 'release' the cartridge fires when the shopper removes the voucher or abandons the basket. Response matches the documented Redeem Voucher Output 'Reinstate - Reserved to Issued' sample: { remainingAmount, status }.
notes: Called by VoucherApplier.remove. Reinstate needs the reservationKey returned by the earlier Reserve. Like reserve, a failure here is non-fatal, the local adjustment is still stripped. (A reinstate can also resolve to status 'Expired' if the voucher lapsed while reserved.)
